title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions:
Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions!
